creator: mi+kde@aldan.algebra.com
text:
On 횖'횗횚횓횋횄횗 22 횧횇횘횞횇횓횠 2007, you wrote:
= Yes, I can confirm, it works in FreeBSD 7.0 AMD64, and FreeBSD
= 6.2-STABLE i386 with CPUTYPE used in compile.

I figured the "CPUTYPE" thing out... Indeed, when CFLAGS are not modified 
in /etc/make.conf _at all_, the default 
ones "-O2 -fomit-frame-pointer -pipe " contain a blank space at the end, 
somehow...

This freaks gdb's picky configure out...

I put a work-around into the port's makefile...

	-mi
